location: Inside a chest in the back of a broken carriage along the road to Castle Morne, roughly between the region's first grace and Castle Morne Rampart, in the Weeping Peninsula.
tactics: A Troll and a few other enemies guard the carriage — clear them first, or sprint straight in and grab the chest if under-leveled.
No boss or invader gates this pickup, unlike a lot of Weeping Peninsula loot — it's a safe early grab.
The carriage sits right on the main road, easy to spot heading south from Bridge of Sacrifice toward Castle Morne.
lore: A spiked metal globe on a handle — it lands as a blunt bludgeon, but the ring of spikes around the head is sharp enough to tear flesh and draw blood.

builds.name: Strength Bleed Bludgeon
builds.why: Blunt strike damage plus a built-in bleed passive lets a pure Strength build stack blood loss on top of stance damage.
